caption: 自行掌握限额测算

view.params:
SELECT cangkuzl.SID,cangkuzl.ckmc
FROM cangkuzl
ORDER BY cangkuzl.SID ASC

SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(cght.hthm)
FROM cght
ORDER BY cght.hthm ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.bm like "%外销%")
 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT kh.SID,kh.company_name
FROM kh
ORDER BY kh.SID ASC

name: 自行掌握限额测算
title_field: 自行掌握限额测算.查询年份
